prompt: Tap flop left for out-of-position range check.
why_v1: Board anchor keeps street context stable before range action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Left flop card anchored for the out-of-position range check.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The left flop card is the correct anchor because the first flop cue starts the texture read that tells the out-of-position range how much defense it can support.
